baseline.observed: returned JSON with preview_sort latest and warning: Unknown preview sort requested: nonsense; used latest.

observed_weaknesses: The CLI treated an invalid explicit --preview-sort value as a successful scan.
Automation could misspell a sort value and still receive exit code 0.

selected_candidate.name: CLI preview-sort value rejection
selected_candidate.reason: Keep CLI option parsing fail-closed for explicit user input while preserving library fallback behavior for API callers.
selected_candidate.success_metric: Invalid --preview-sort exits non-zero; quality_asc alias and documented quality-asc values still work.

safety_controls: The change is limited to promptvault-cli.rs.
Existing underscore and weakest/strongest aliases are normalized for backward compatibility.
The library PreviewSort fallback remains unchanged.
npm run check was rerun after the change.
